event: View of St. Jean d'Acre (Akko) from the Beach
description: A watercolor painting showing a wide, flat beach with shallow water. In the foreground, a figure rides a horse, and in the middle distance, a group of horses and riders are visible. The distant skyline shows the city of Acre (St. Jean d'Acre) with buildings, a minaret, and waterfront structures. A ship is visible at far left. The palette is pale and atmospheric — soft pinks, blues, and warm sandy tones. The style is loose and impressionistic.
